# PERF-235 positive: temporary builder flushed through .String() into sink
lang: go
file: PERF-235-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"strings"
)

func Render(dst *bytes.Buffer, parts []string) {
	var sb strings.Builder
	for _, p := range parts {
		sb.WriteString(p)
	}
	dst.WriteString(sb.String())
}
